alerts.title: Be Weather Aware - A Winter Storm Warning is in effect beginning tonight
alerts.description: A Winter Storm Warning is in effect for all areas of RMNP beginning at midnight tonight on May 4 through the afternoon of Wednesday, May 6. Temporary road closures may go into effect at any time, based on conditions. 12-18 inches of new snow is possible on both the east and west sides of RMNP. Over 20 inches of snow is possible at Bear Lake. Check the National Weather Service page specific to RMNP frequently for the most up to date weather information.
